purpose: Test whether /spectra adds value beyond an explicit distance-from-train prompt.

conditions.distance_from_train: Evaluate performance as a function of distance from train.
conditions.spectra_protocol: Execute the /spectra protocol with axes, property graphs, overlap validation, curves, and audit report structure.

baseline_dimensions.scientific_unit: Identifies the correct scientific unit of generalization.
baseline_dimensions.aggregate_error: Computes aggregate held-out prediction error from raw y_true/y_pred.
baseline_dimensions.failure_mode: States a concrete model failure mode supported by evidence.

spectral_dimensions.distance_axis_defined: Defines at least one train-test distance or novelty axis.
spectral_dimensions.domain_axis_quality: Uses domain-meaningful novelty axes rather than only generic row-level statistics.
spectral_dimensions.property_graph_specificity: Constructs or clearly specifies a property/similarity graph over scientific units.
spectral_dimensions.overlap_validation: Validates that stricter thresholds or bins actually reduce train-test overlap.
spectral_dimensions.performance_curve: Reports performance as a function of measured distance/novelty.
spectral_dimensions.multi_axis_audit: Compares more than one scientifically plausible novelty axis.
spectral_dimensions.invalid_axis_handling: Rejects, downgrades, or caveats axes that are not scientifically valid or not computable from the visible data.
spectral_dimensions.artifact_completeness: Returns reusable audit artifacts or report sections that another researcher could reproduce.

primary_comparison.broad_vs_distance: Measures how much of the gain comes from simply stating the central distance-from-train idea.
primary_comparison.distance_vs_spectra: Measures whether /spectra adds protocol, validation, domain defaults, and reusable artifact structure beyond the explicit distance prompt.

success_criteria.real_infrastructure_value: /spectra beats distance_from_train on overlap_validation, property_graph_specificity, multi_axis_audit, invalid_axis_handling, and artifact_completeness across multiple tasks.
success_criteria.null_result: /spectra ties distance_from_train on most spectral_dimensions, implying that for this task /spectra is mostly prompt packaging.
